Document:
# Stat Modifiers & Overflow
This page covers how stat modifiers stack, how overflow is handled, and how the system tracks which source each bonus comes from.
## ModifierSource Enum
Each modifier has a source that identifies where it came from:
public enum ModifierSource { Spell, // From active spells or spell trees Spend, // From spending character creation points Item, // From equipped items Buff, // From temporary buff effects Racial, // From racial innate bonuses Other }
## How Modifiers Stack
All modifier sources sum together:
EffectiveStat = BaseStat + Modifiers[Spell] + Modifiers[Item] + Modifiers[Buff] + ...
The result is capped at MaxStat (10).
## Overflow Handling
When modifiers push a stat past the cap, the overflow is returned as available character points:
Overflow = (BaseStat + TotalModifiers) - MaxStat AvailablePoints += Overflow
This ensures no bonus is "wasted" — excess modifier value becomes points you can spend elsewhere.
## Validation
The server validates point-spending against the [bold]effective stat[/bold] (base + modifiers), not just the base stat. This prevents spending points on a stat that is already capped by modifiers.
## Content Under Construction
Detailed API documentation coming soon. See [textlink="Modifier System" link="OE14_DEV_Arch_Modifiers"] for the architectural overview.
